devices.power_meter: Favero Assioma pedals (first rides 2026-07-19/20; same model as Jonathan's)
notes: Fenix-computed TSS/IF use the watch's configured FTP (~260 W as of Jul 2026) — WRONG for Robert; recompute against 190 W or ignore in favor of HR + kJ.
W/kg at LT2: 2.0 — power-to-weight is the limiter, not durability.
Compressed HR range (118-145 = 27 bpm): tempo is a 4-bpm window; power now available for pacing.

Lab FTP 190 (Dec 2025) may be stale-low vs Jul 2026 fitness — first Assioma rides show NP near 190 at P2 heart rates. Re-baseline with a field test or accumulate matched-HR power data before trusting TSS.

analysis_rules: Analyze Robert's rides ONLY against this profile — never Jonathan's anchors, Training Log, or ride_metrics.csv trend.
Data folder: Partner_Garmin. Vault home: 'Robert Raff - Athlete Profile.md' (+ Ride_Analyses notes labeled '(Robert)').
Primary read is HR-in-his-zones + total work (kJ); treat MTB NP with caution (surging at 95 kg inflates it, VI 1.3+).
Wrist-vs-strap: verify HR spikes before trusting max HR (68-bpm jump artifact seen 2026-07-19).
